← All IRC handicap examples

IRC — DNF receives fleet-size penalty; finishers still scored on corrected time

A5.1: a boat that did not finish receives points equal to fleet entries + 1. Time-based scoring does not affect penalty point calculation.

Scoring system: IRC    Gun time: 14:00:00 
Fleet size = 3, so penalty = 4.
Start 14:00:00 (= 50400 s since midnight)

Boat 1 (TCC 1.0): finish 15:00:00  ET = 3600 s   CT = 3600.0 s  → 1st  (1 pt)
Boat 2 (TCC 1.0): DNF                                             → n/a  (4 pts)
Boat 3 (TCC 1.0): finish 15:01:00  ET = 3660 s   CT = 3660.0 s  → 2nd  (2 pts)
RankNameSail #TCCFinish timeETTCFCTPoints
1 Alpha 1 1.000 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s 1
2 Gamma 3 1.000 15:01:00 61m 00s 1.0000 61m 00s 2
— Beta 2 1.000 DNF — — — 4
sailscoring.ie
